title: MCP Session State
description: Schemas for managing opaque session state tokens across tool calls, enabling stateful interactions without exposing internal server state.

SessionState.title: Session State
SessionState.description: Represents a session with an opaque state token that persists across tool calls.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the session was created.

server_name.description: Name of the server that owns this session.

tool_context.description: The tool context associated with this session.

StateUpdateRequest.title: State Update Request
StateUpdateRequest.description: A tool call that includes session state for continuity across invocations.

tool.description: Name of the tool to invoke.

parameters.description: Parameters to pass to the tool.

session_state.description: Opaque state token from previous response.

StateUpdateResponse.title: State Update Response
StateUpdateResponse.description: A tool response that includes an updated session state token.

session_state.description: Updated state token for next call.

state_changed.description: Whether the session state was modified by this call.

SessionLifecycleEvent.title: Session Lifecycle Event
SessionLifecycleEvent.description: An event representing a change in session lifecycle.

session_id.description: Identifier of the session this event pertains to.

reason.description: Optional explanation for the lifecycle event.
